title: Federal OSHA — File a Complaint (Safety, Health & Whistleblower)
description: Scrape of OSHA's complaint-filing hub covering two pathways: (1) Safety and Health complaints for unsafe conditions, filed confidentially online/phone/fax/mail/in person; and (2) Whistleblower complaints for retaliation, enforceable under 20+ whistleblower-protection statutes. Explains the distinction, filing methods, anonymous filing, and multilingual submission.

source.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor — Occupational Safety and Health Administration

notes: DEADLINES (stated on page): safety/health — OSHA cannot cite violations more than 6 months old; whistleblower — 30 to 180 days depending on statute. NOTE: MA public-sector worksites are primarily covered by MA DLS (see 04-ma-dls), not federal OSHA. File ~7.5 KB.
